items.name: Tostones Trio
items.description: Twice-fried smashed green plantains topped with coleslaw, queso fresco, garlic-cilantro sauce, and salsa rosada. Please select your fillings below. If you pick 1 flavor, we’ll make all 3 the same. If you pick 2 flavors, we’ll make one of each and choose the third for you unless you leave us a note with your preference.
items.ingredientsText: Twice-fried smashed green plantains topped with coleslaw, queso fresco, garlic-cilantro sauce, and salsa rosada. Please select your fillings below. items.name: Pandoro Choco Mini Cake
items.description: A rich and irresistible take on the classic pandoro, Bauli Panmoro is made for true chocolate fans. This soft, fluffy cake is enriched with cocoa, studded with chocolate chips, and finished with a dusting of sweetened cocoa powder. Elegant and indulgent, it's a bold holiday treat with deep flavor and signature Italian craftsmanship.
